hard_checks.tolerance: at least 1000 events and five sites

identifiability.method: class factorization, canonical state ordering, exposure, and structural audit

optimizer.stopping_rule: frozen finite configuration grid and staged fidelity limits

preprocessing.detrending: none; seasonality represented by frozen monthly/state laws
preprocessing.missingness_rule: registered variable-specific QC; no imputation or realized-month repair
